title: Vinayaka Hospital — Multi-speciality hospital in BTM Bengaluru
heading: Welcome to Vinayaka Hospital
description: Vinayaka Hospital is a multi-speciality hospital in BTM 4th Stage, Bengaluru — offering obstetrics, gynaecology, fertility, paediatrics, cardiology, orthopaedics, surgery, dermatology and more. 25+ years of trusted family care.

Founded in 2002 by Dr. Jaya Subrahmanyam, Vinayaka Hospital began as a women's health practice and grew into a multi-speciality unit serving families across BTM, Bommanahalli and surrounding neighbourhoods. We focus on getting the small things right — a familiar face at the front desk, doctors who remember your history, and clear answers when you ask a question. Read our full story Personalised care Every patient gets a treatment plan shaped around their history, lifestyle and goals — not a one-size template. A team across specialties Obstetricians, paediatricians, surgeons and physicians who actually talk to each other when your case needs it. Evidence-based practice Care that follows current Indian and international clinical guidelines — explained to you in plain language. Why families choose us Care that feels personal — and clinically sound. Mother & baby first From the first antenatal visit to neonatal care — a single coordinated team handles both ends of your delivery. Senior consultants only Every department is led by a consultant with 10+ years of clinical experience. You will not be passed between junior trainees. Round-the-clock emergency 24×7 maternity and neonatal cover with an on-call obstetrician and paediatrician any night of the week. Clean, safe environment Infection-control protocols, sterilised OTs and a dedicated postnatal ward designed for rest and recovery. Transparent packages Antenatal, delivery and surgery packages are quoted up-front so there are no surprises at discharge. Two decades of trust Generations of families from south Bengaluru — and counting. We treat children of patients we delivered ourselves. Health blogs Notes from our consultants. Practical, jargon-free reading on pregnancy, paediatrics, women's health and preventive care — written by the doctors who treat these conditions every day. The team remembered me from my first delivery five years earlier — it felt less like a hospital and more like a familiar place to come back to. Anitha R. BTM Layout Took my mother in for a knee consultation. They explained every option — surgery and non-surgery — before recommending the conservative route. Appreciated the honesty. Sridhar K. Bommanahalli We went through almost two years of fertility treatment. The doctors never rushed us, never overpromised. Our daughter is one now. Pavitra S. Begur Road Not sure who to consult? Tell us about your concern. Share a few details and our front desk will route you to the right specialist — usually within the same working day. Book an Appointment +91 99809 55836 Visit · Call · Email Find us in BTM 4th Stage. We're a 10-minute auto ride from Bommanahalli signal, with easy access from Hosur Road and the Outer Ring Road.
